sinapse-memory.description: Sinapse Agent — Universal Memory Layer (Hive-Mind). 12 tools: sinapse_query, sinapse_save_decision, sinapse_save_learning, sinapse_health, sinapse_session_end, sinapse_temporal_search, sinapse_temporal_save, sinapse_temporal_graph_search, sinapse_zettelkasten_split, sinapse_capture_screen, sinapse_plan_goal, search_memories.
